title: SmartInventory — AI-Powered Stock Manager
description: A full-stack inventory management system with ML-based demand forecasting. Built a real-time dashboard with WebSocket updates, automated reorder triggers, and an admin panel for multi-warehouse management.
contribution: Designed the entire backend architecture using FastAPI and PostgreSQL. Implemented the demand forecasting module using scikit-learn. Set up Docker Compose for local development and GitHub Actions for CI/CD.

title: DevPulse — Developer Productivity Tracker
description: A SaaS dashboard that aggregates GitHub, Jira, and Slack activity to give engineering teams visibility into productivity metrics, sprint velocity, and code review bottlenecks.
contribution: Built the OAuth integrations for GitHub and Jira. Designed the metrics aggregation pipeline and REST API. Created interactive chart components using Recharts in Next.js.

title: ChatterBot — Real-Time Chat Application
description: A scalable real-time messaging platform supporting private DMs, group rooms, file sharing, and end-to-end encryption. Handles 10,000+ concurrent connections with horizontal scaling.
contribution: Architected the WebSocket server using FastAPI and Redis Pub/Sub for fan-out messaging. Implemented JWT-based authentication and rate limiting middleware.

title: CloudBilling — AWS Cost Analytics Tool
description: An internal tool that parses AWS Cost Explorer data, maps costs to teams and services, and generates weekly reports with anomaly detection alerts sent via Slack.
contribution: Wrote the AWS Cost Explorer ingestion scripts and anomaly detection logic. Built the Slack notification bot and automated weekly PDF report generation using ReportLab.
